name: Dinner in a Pumpkin
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the top of the pumpkin and thoroughly clean out the seeds and pulp.
2. Preheat the oven to 250°F.
3. Brown the sausage in a pan, breaking it into small pieces as it cooks. Drain excess grease.
4. Add onion, celery, and green pepper to the pan and cook for a few minutes.
5. In a large pot, add soup mix to boiling water and cook according to package instructions.
6. Combine all ingredients (including cooked rice) in a bowl.
7. Pour the mixture into the clean pumpkin shell.
8. Replace the pumpkin top and place it on a baking sheet.
9. Bake for one hour or until the pumpkin is tender, stirring once halfway through.
10. Remove the pumpkin lid and serve by scooping out some of the cooked pumpkin into each bowl.
